Question: Multan me ghar khareednay ka kya tareeqa car hai?
Answer: Sub se pehle property select karein, uske baad registry/intiqal verify karein, token money dein, bayana agreement sign karein, aur end me registry office (ya DHA office) ja kar transfer karwain.

Question: Kya overseas Pakistanis baahir se remotely property le saktay hain?
Answer: Ji bilkul, overseas Pakistanis kisi trusted bande ko Pakistani Embassy se attested 'Special Power of Attorney' (SPA) bhaij kar apne naam par property transfer karwa saktay hain.

Question: Plot aur file me kya faraq hota hai?
Answer: Plot ka matlab hai jiski zameen par physical location maujood ho. File ek aisi raseed ya right hota hai jiska abhi ballot hona baqi ho aur zameen par nishan-dehi na hui ho.

Question: Property transfer me kitna time lagta hai?
Answer: DHA Multan ya private societies me takreeban 7 se 14 din lagtay hain, jabki katchery (registry/intiqal) ke zariye 2 se 4 hafte lag saktay hain.

Question: Kya bagair NOC wali housing schemes me invest karna safe hai?
Answer: Nahi, MDA (Multan Development Authority) se approved NOC ke bagair invest karna bohot risky hai, kyunki aisi societies baad me illegal declare ho sakti hain.

Question: Possession plot ka kya matlab hota hai?
Answer: Possession plot ka matlab hai zameen par development mukammal ho chuki hai, aur aap map approve karwa kar foran ghar banana shuru kar saktay hain.

Question: Property dealer asli hai ya fraud, ye kaise pata chalega?
Answer: Check karein ke unka office physical maujood ho, wo excise department aur FBR (DNFBP) me registered hon, aur local realtors association ke member hon.

Question: Agent ke bagair direct property lene me kya nuqsan ho sakta hai?
Answer: Nuqsan ye ho sakta hai ke aapko documents ki verification ka pata nahi chalega, fraud ke chances hotay hain, aur aap market rate se zyada price pay kar saktay hain.

Question: Multan me 1 Marla kitne square feet ka hota hai?
Answer: DHA aur modern societies me 1 Marla 272.25 sqft ka hota hai, jabki purani ya traditional areas me kuch jagah 225 sqft ka bhi hota hai. Hamesha dealer se pehle confirm karein.

Question: Kya Multan me ghar installments par mil saktay hain?
Answer: Ji bilkul, Bosan Road aur DHA me nayi housing schemes aur apartments ke projects hain jo 1 se 3 saal tak ke installment plans offer kartay hain.

Question: Kya DHA Multan me ghar lena family ke liye behtar hai?
Answer: Ji haan, DHA Multan me behtareen security, saaf pani, achay schools aur commercial markets kareeb hain, isliye ye rehne ke liye bohot acchi jagah hai.

Question: DHA Multan me 5 Marla ghar ki average price kya chal rahi hai?
Answer: DHA Multan me 5 Marla ghar ki keemat location aur construction quality par depend karti hai, lekin normal range 70 Lakh se le kar 1.5 Crore tak hai.

Question: DHA Multan me 10 Marla house kitne tak ka mil jata hai?
Answer: DHA Multan me 10 Marla ka ghar takreeban 1.5 Crore se 2.8 Crore PKR ke darmiyan mil jata hai.

Question: Kya DHA Multan me investment karne se faida hoga?
Answer: Ji bilkul, DHA Multan Multan ka prime area hai jahan zameen ki keematain bohot tezi se barh rahi hain, short aur long term dono me accha profit mil sakta hai.

Question: Property khareedte waqt FBR Filer status check karna kyun zaroori hai?
Answer: Property deal me FBR Filer status isliye zaroori hai kyunki Filer ka withholding tax bohot kam hota hai (tax rate 3% se 5%), jabki Non-Filer ko double se zyada tax (10% se 15%) dena parta hai.

Question: Property khareedte waqt Registry aur Intiqal check karna kyun zaroori hai?
Answer: Property deal me Registry aur Intiqal isliye zaroori hai kyunki Registry asil sale deed hoti hai jo sub-registrar ke samne hoti hai, aur Intiqal sarkari record (Patwari registry) me naam change karwane ko kehte hain.

Question: Property khareedte waqt NOC Status check karna kyun zaroori hai?
Answer: Property deal me NOC Status isliye zaroori hai kyunki NOC ka matlab hai ke society legal hai. Agar NOC nahi hai to government unke khilaf action le sakti hai aur electricity/gas block ho sakti hai.

Question: Property khareedte waqt Fard document check karna kyun zaroori hai?
Answer: Property deal me Fard document isliye zaroori hai kyunki Fard ek zameeni raseed hoti hai jo Arazi Record Center ya Patwari issue karta hai, jo ye prove karti hai ke zameen ka asli malik kon hai.

Question: Property khareedte waqt Allotment letter check karna kyun zaroori hai?
Answer: Property deal me Allotment letter isliye zaroori hai kyunki Allotment letter DHA ya baqi barhi societies khud issue karti hain, jab tak ke property ki proper registry na ho jaye.

Question: Kya 2.5 Crore ke budget me DHA Multan me 1 Kanal ka ghar mil sakta hai?
Answer: Ji haan, is budget me DHA Multan ke andar 1 Kanal ka ghar asani se mil sakta hai agar aap condition par compromise karein.

Answer: Sub se behtar tareeqa ye hai ke dono parties face-to-face baith kar saari baatein written agreement (Bayana) par likh lein taake koi jhoot na bol sakay.
